productDisplayName: Nike Men's Classic Fresh Grey Track Pant
description: CompositionGrey track pants made of 100% polyester, with a 100% nylon inner lining, white side panels with grey polka dots running from the waist to the knee, elasticated waist with an inner drawstring, side pockets with an embroidered nike swoosh below the left pocket, and zippered at the leg hem and with drawstringsFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees Wash with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not dry clean Stylish to the T, these grey polyester track pants from nike are designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The smart side pockets are spacious enough to hold your wallet, iPod and other essentials. The broad waistband sits snugly, while you can further customise the Fit using the drawstring. The zippers at the leg hem allows for a more flexible movement coupled with the drawstrings that allow you to create a better customised fit. Team it with a Nike Athletic Department t-shirt and a pair of nike sports shoes for that ultimate in comfort.
